Environment | Variable | Value | Source | |---------------------|--------------------------------------------|-----------------| | `TEST_URL` | `https://the-internet.herokuapp.com` | `projects/demo/.env` | | `TEST_AUTH_URL` | *(empty ‚Äî not applicable)* | `projects/demo/.env` | | `TEST_USER` | `tomsmith` | `projects/demo/.env` | | `TEST_PASS` | `SuperSecretPassword!` | `projects/demo/.env` | | `IDENTITY_PROVIDER` | *(N/A ‚Äî plain HTML form auth)* | `projects/demo/.env` | **Viewport:** `1920√ó1080`, `deviceScaleFactor: 1` (fixed, per `playwright-rules`). **Base URL** is set in root `playwright.config.ts`; tests call `page.goto('/path')`. --- ## 2. Authentication | Attribute | Detail | |---------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------| | **Type** | Simple HTML form ‚Äî **not** Azure AD / Cognito federation | | **Login route** | `GET /login` | | **Username field** | `#username` | | **Password field** | `#password` | | **Submit button** | `button[type="submit"]` | | **Success signal** | `.flash.success` containing `"You logged into a secure area"` + redirect to `/secure` | | **Failure signal** | `.flash.error` containing `"Your username is invalid"`, stays on `/login` | | **Logout signal** | `.flash.success` containing `"You logged out of the secure area"`, redirects to `/login` | > **Note:** `tests/helpers/auth.helper.ts` (Azure AD scaffold) is present as a framework > requirement but is **not invoked** for this project. Direct form selectors are used. **Login flow (step-by-step):** ``` 1. page.goto('/login') 2. page.locator('#username').fill(TEST_USER) 3. page.locator('#password').fill(TEST_PASS) 4. page.locator('button[type="submit"]').click() 5. Expect: URL ‚Üí /secure | .flash.success visible ``` --- ## 3. Application Architecture **Framework / Stack:** Server-rendered HTML (public reference app ‚Äî `the-internet.herokuapp.com`).
